title: Why being in an FA Cup semi-final means so much to Leeds fans
summary: Leeds United's FA Cup semi-final against Chelsea holds deep significance for the club's long-suffering supporters. The match represents a major opportunity for the club to advance in a prestigious competition.
content: BBC Sport looks at why the FA Cup semi-final against Chelsea means so much to long-suffering Leeds United fans.

zh.title: 为什么足总杯半决赛对利兹联球迷意义重大
zh.summary: 利兹联与切尔西的足总杯半决赛对这家俱乐部备受折磨的球迷具有深远意义。这场比赛代表了俱乐部在这项声望竞赛中向前推进的重大机会。
